title: Onboarding - Eula page - Continue
scenario: Verify the EULA page during onboarding requires checking the agreement box before the Continue button becomes active, and then proceeds to the Up-to-Date page.
steps: Start the app for the first time.

After initial setup screens, verify "Well hello, first things first..." is visible, along with the agreement text, License Agreement and Privacy Policy links, a blurred Continue button, and working animation.
Tap Continue without checking the agreement box – nothing should happen.
Tap Continue – verify the "Up-to-Date" page appears with the correct text, a Skip button, and working animation.
expected: The "Up-to-Date" page appears with the correct text, a Skip button, and working animation.
